rules.title: FEELINGS vs. CAUSES
rules.formula: The feeling uses -ED | The cause uses -ING
rules.explainA: Use -ed to describe how a person feels.
rules.explainB: Use -ing to describe the situation that causes the feeling.
rules.teacherNote: PLE TRAP: If the subject is a person, they are usually -ed. If it's a thing, it's usually -ing.
